name: Shrimp Scampi & Pasta Penny Fogelson (Rgjn26b)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil for the pasta.
2. Combine broth, garlic, and 4 tablespoons each of chopped shallots and parsley in a large saucepan. Bring slowly to a simmer; cook for 2 minutes.
3. Add pasta to boiling water; cool according to directions.
4. Add shrimp to the broth mixture, stirring well and cooking for 2 1/2 to 3 1/2 minutes, or until shrimp are cooked through. Add remaining shallots.
5. Drain pasta; divide evenly among large shallow plates. Arrange shrimp over pasta and spoon the broth sauce over shrimp. Sprinkle with pepper and garnish with remaining parsley. Serve immediately. Serves 6 as an appetizer or 4 as an entree.
